ai-reader.blurb: An agentic reading companion for fiction & research papers — a spoiler-aware e-reader whose multi-agent system builds a temporal knowledge graph of every book and answers questions grounded only in what you've read so far.

langgraph-rag-agent.blurb: A LangGraph ReAct agent for year-aware, source-grounded Q&A over Eli Lilly's public financial filings (2003–2024) — it picks the year, retrieves the right passages, and answers with citations. (Built for my Lilly interview.)

jobhunt-ai.blurb: Multi-agent job-search orchestration — a LangGraph fleet + Playwright browser automation + vector memory that hunts roles across Indian portals and adapts the résumé per role, driven by a 'heartbeat' that wakes the agents proactively.

idp-product-extractor.blurb: A layout-first multimodal pipeline that turns messy vendor PDF catalogues into structured, website-ready product data — and a controlled four-way study of traditional / VLM-only / hybrid / agentic extraction.

agentic-flow.blurb: An agent factory — hand it a task and it assembles the agents (and the code to run them) needed to execute it. Spawns specialized sub-agents and wires them into a working flow.

ai-shayar.blurb: An Indic poetry LLM — fine-tuned Gemma 2 (QLoRA via Unsloth) on Ghalib's shayari scraped from Rekhta, so it writes Urdu/Hindi verse in his style. A first step toward better Indic-language models.

wifi-tracker.blurb: Open-source ISP diagnostics — continuously monitors your connection, keeps session history, and generates plain-English audit reports, so you have proof when your ISP insists 'everything's fine.'

eudaimonai-ai-advisor.blurb: Eud-AI-monia — a multi-modal LangGraph life advisor that quantifies, tracks, and optimizes health, finance, and life metrics, then turns them into personalized guidance.

startbrief-client-intelligence.blurb: StartBrief — extracts reliable, structured intelligence from large volumes of client calls. I built it to pre-empt a 'call-insights at scale' problem and showcased it in my interview to land the Gartner role.

dent-supply-website.blurb: End-to-end product website for Dent Supply, a dental-supply business — catalogue, admin, and deployment built from scratch.
